name: Beef Noodle Skillet
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Frozen mixed vegetables (broccoli, cauliflower, carrots)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beef and onions in a large skillet until meat is no longer pink.
2. Add water, bouillon cubes, gravy, and thyme to the skillet. Stir well.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, stirring often.
4. Stir in noodles and frozen vegetables. Return to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 8-10 minutes, stirring twice, until noodles are tender.
6. Remove from heat and stir in sour cream.
